name: Our Universe (Observable)
description: The observable baryonic universe. Hubble volume (~4.4×10²⁶ m radius). Cosmic composition: 73.9% hydrogen, 24.0% helium, 2.1% heavier elements (iron proxy for metals). Mass is the Planck 2018 baryonic mass estimate: Ω_b×ρ_c×V. In SSBM, dark matter is nested baryons at depth σ — the total matter budget is higher, but only the observable baryonic fraction is counted here.
